Title: Google Summer Internship
Description: Summer internship opportunity at Google focusing on software development and engineering practices.
Requirements: Strong programming skills in any language, Data Structures and Algorithms, Minimum CGPA of 7.5

Title: Amazon SDE Internship
Description: 6-month internship opportunity with Amazon's retail tech team, working on real-world e-commerce solutions.
Requirements: CGPA > 7.0, Strong problem-solving skills, Knowledge of web technologies

Title: Mercedes-Benz Mechanical Design Internship
Description: Internship opportunity in automotive design and manufacturing at Mercedes-Benz Research India.
Requirements: Knowledge of CAD/CAM, Understanding of automotive systems, Good analytical skills
